zh.lifeSummary: 當Roberta Houghton於1531年出生在英國越可爾哈利法可哈利法可 聖 詹姆斯時，她的父親Maxwell Houghton20歲，母親Margaret Elliot18歲。她和Richard Downes至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1585年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史盧比享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Houghton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Houghton or Hoghton. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different etymologies; for example, Little Houghton in Eccles (Lancashire), which derives from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn, and Houghton in Bigbury (Devon), which may derive from an Old English personal name Huhha + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Haughton
meanings: English: habitational name from Haughton (Cheshire, Lancashire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Staffordshire), or Haughton le Skerne (Durham). The placenames derive from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .
Irish: adopted for Ó hEacháin ‘descendant of Eachán’, a pet form of the personal name Eachaidh (see Hoey ).
Irish: adopted for Ó hEachtair ‘descendant of Eachtair’, a personal name of uncertain origin. Compare Hoctor .

variants.name: Hufton
meanings: English: habitational name; probably from Stony Houghton in Pleasley (Derbyshire), the name of which derives from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .

nameMeanings.name: Roberta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Roberta Houghton was born in 1531, in Halifax St James, Halifax, Yorkshire, England, her father, Maxwell Houghton, was 20 and her mother, Margaret Elliot, was 18. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Richard Downes. She died about 1585, in Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

ja.lifeSummary: Roberta Houghtonが1531年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスハリファックス スト ジャムスで生まれた時，父Maxwell Houghtonは20歳，母Margaret Elliotは18歳であった。彼女はRichard Downesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1585年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスクルービーで55歳で死去した。

ko.Halifax St James, Halifax, Yorkshire, En: 영국 요르크실르 할이파스 할이파스 스트 자메스
ko.lifeSummary: Roberta Houghton(이)가 1531년 영국 요르크실르 할이파스 할이파스 스트 자메스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Maxwell Houghton(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Elliot(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Richard Downes(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1585년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스크루비에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.
